pyqgis_plugin.name: automate
pyqgis_plugin.description: Plug-in QGIS per progetti di infrastrutture gas
pyqgis_plugin.about:
The AUTOMATE v3 plugin for QGIS is a comprehensive, modular toolkit for GIS-based gas infrastructure project design, with an evolved photo workflow, hardened migration platform, and a streamlined modern tooling stack.
🚀 VERSION 3 FEATURES: • Advanced PhotoEditor workflow with modular tools and improved editing UX • Unified legacy migration and new-project orchestration with stronger diagnostics • Modernized developer workflow based on pyproject.toml + uv + ruff + pyright • Improved runtime/deploy reliability with safer dependency and packaging pipelines
🔧 CORE FUNCTIONALITIES: • RG_COD Management: Manual generation and automated calculation with on/off toggle switch • PhotoEditor Integration: Advanced photo management with Google Street View API and custom editor • Attachment Management: Complete file handling system with trash management • Quality Control: Comprehensive project validation with custom reporting • Project Packaging: Automated zip creation for project submission • Configuration Management: Advanced settings and preferences system • Metadata Cache: Local SQLite mirror synchronized from the DB Master with periodic background checks • Sections / Regolamenti: Standalone workflow with bootstrap, legacy migration and GPKG management • DB Tool: Authenticated SQLite editor workspace with publish back to the DB Master
🏗️ MODULAR ARCHITECTURE: • tools/rg_cod/: RG code generation system with automation control • tools/photo/: Photo management and editing capabilities • tools/attachments/: File attachment and deletion system • tools/controller/: Quality assurance and validation tools • tools/section/: Sections dialog, GPKG sync, legacy migration and regolamenti project bootstrap • tools/settings/: Configuration dialogs and preferences • tools/db_editor/: Authenticated DB editor workflow and DB Master publish orchestration • tools/zip/: Project compression and progress tracking • core/: Shared utilities and configuration management • database/: Metadata reader factory, SQLite reader, DB Master cache sync and DB editor services
The plugin seamlessly integrates into QGIS interface with a dedicated toolbar for efficient workflow management.
pyqgis_plugin.tags: python, gas infrastructure, project design, automation, photo management, quality control, modular architecture
